code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut sum = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
mut stopped = false

while i <= n and not stopped
  mut is_boundary = false
  if i == n
    is_boundary = true
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_boundary = true
    end
  end

  if is_boundary
    if i > start
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let parsed = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if parsed < 0
        stopped = true
      else
        sum = sum + parsed
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end

  i = i + 1
end

print("partial=#{sum}")
